title: Businesses and employees report rising concerns about a potential recession according to Principal® survey
text: DES MOINES, Iowa--( BUSINESS WIRE )--While most U.S. small and midsized businesses and their employees believe a recession is likely in 2023, business owners are opting to raise prices and reduce operating expenses before cutting salaries or benefits, according to the latest Principal Well-Being IndexSM (WBI) study by Principal Financial Group ®.

title: Principal® joins First Women's Bank as Mission Partner
text: DES MOINES, Iowa--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Principal Financial Group ® is proud to announce its support today for First Women's Bank (FWB) as a Mission Partner, providing capital to fuel growth for women-owned businesses.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Principal Financial (PFG) Stock
text: Principal Financial (PFG) remains well-poised to gain from group benefits and protection in the United States, higher single premium annuity sales, and strong capital position.
